headline: The ozone layer is healing — on track for full recovery
meta_description: The ozone layer is on track to fully recover within decades, UN assessments confirm — the Montreal Protocol is working.
summary_short: UN scientists confirm the ozone layer is steadily recovering thanks to a worldwide ban on harmful chemicals — proof cooperation works.
body:
In the 1980s, humanity discovered it had torn a hole in the sky. Then it did something remarkable: every country on Earth agreed to ban the chemicals responsible. Decades later, UN scientific assessments confirm the ozone layer is steadily healing and on track to recover fully over the coming decades.

The Montreal Protocol has become the most successful environmental treaty ever signed, preventing millions of future skin-cancer cases and helping the climate along the way. Whenever someone says global problems are unsolvable, the sky itself offers a quiet correction: we broke it, we agreed to fix it, and it is mending.
